desc.overhead: Reach both arms straight up overhead
desc.behind_head: Clasp both hands behind your head
desc.cross_body: Pull one arm across to the opposite side
desc.side: Raise one arm and bend your upper body to the side
desc.shoulder_shrug: Keep your head still and lift only your shoulders toward your ears
desc.neck_side: Keep your shoulders level and tilt only your head to the side
desc.forward_fold: While seated, fold your upper body forward

calib.title: Personalize your stretch range
calib.subtitle: Personalizes detection accuracy to 100% for your flexibility and camera mounting angle.
calib.holdPose: Hold the pose steadily and wait...
calib.captureHint:
After checking the joint landmark state,
click the Save this pose button below!
calib.firstReg: 💡 First calibration: No previous custom record. Registering your current pose as your own stretch-detection baseline!
calib.maxShiftPrefix: * Joint with the largest range increase:
calib.confirmResetOne: Delete all angle calibration for this stretch and reset to default detection mode?
calib.confirmResetAll: Really reset all stretch calibration and restore the default admin standard data?
calib.descMinor: A slight posture change vs before was detected. Fine-tuning to a more comfortable angle.
calib.descSame: Almost identical to your previous calibration. Stably fine-tuned.
calib.descWide: A wider, more relaxed new range of motion detected. Strong custom personalization applied!
calib.descSignificant: Your range of motion changed significantly. Calibrated to your body's current flexibility.
